description.value: **Benefit:** When using the Diplomacy skill to make a request or change a creatureâs attitude, you can use verbal misdirection. To do so, make a Bluff check against that creature. If you succeed, you gain a +4 bonus on your next Diplomacy check against that creature if the check is made within the next minute. If you fail by 5 or more, you instead take a â2 penalty on your next Diplomacy check against that creature. Alternatively, you can use this feat to retry a single failed Diplomacy check against a creature. You take a â4 penalty on your Bluff check when using Rhetorical Flourish in this way. If you succeed, rather than gaining this featâs normal bonus, you can retry your last Diplomacy check against the creature if that check was made in the past minute.
